description: Equip the Pasubio bus fleet in the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) with battery devices and install a fast-charging station. The charging station must be named 'fast_charger' with a power of 250000 and efficiency of 0.95, positioned at the exact location (lane, startPos, and endPos) of the first bus stop listed in pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml. Configure the bus vType with a maximum battery capacity of 300000 and an initial actual battery capacity of 150000. Run the simulation to generate a battery output file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery.xml. Identify the minimum actual battery capacity (in Wh) recorded for any bus across the entire simulation. Create a report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_report.txt containing the charging station's lane ID (labeled 'charging_lane') and the minimum battery level rounded to two decimal places (labeled 'min_battery_wh').
